name: Georgia Waldorf Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and dice unpeeled apples.
2. Toss the diced apples with lemon juice.
3. Add celery and nuts to the apple mixture.
4. Blend a small amount of mayonnaise into peanut butter, then blend this mixture into the remaining mayonnaise.
5. Add salt to the blended mixture.
6. Combine the seasoned mayonnaise mixture with the apple, celery, and nut mixture.
7. Serve on salad greens.
